activation_mode.mechanism: activation_modes extension: always (unconditional), conditional (glob patterns), model (AI decides), manual (explicit toggle)

auto_memory.mechanism: auto_generated_memories: Windsurf AI generates persistent memories stored in .windsurf/memories/ as rule-like files

cross_provider_recognition.mechanism: agents_md_auto_scoping: Windsurf reads AGENTS.md files from other providers and applies them with workspace-aware scoping

file_imports.mechanism: No @-import or file inclusion syntax documented for Windsurf rule files

hierarchical_loading.mechanism: Windsurf rule files are global or workspace-scoped; no subdirectory precedence model documented

providerExtensions.name: Four activation modes via trigger frontmatter
providerExtensions.summary: Rules select one of four activation modes (always_on, model_decision, glob, or manual) via frontmatter.

providerExtensions.name: AGENTS.md: location-based auto-scoping without frontmatter
providerExtensions.summary: AGENTS.md files use no frontmatter; root-level files are always-on while subdirectory files become auto-glob rules scoped to that subtree.

providerExtensions.name: Global, workspace, and system rule scopes
providerExtensions.summary: Rules load from three user scopes plus an enterprise system scope, with per-scope character limits and OS-specific managed paths.

providerExtensions.name: Auto-generated memories distinct from rules
providerExtensions.summary: Cascade auto-generates workspace-scoped memories during conversations, stored separately from user-authored Rules and not committed to git.
